name: synamail
description: Server-side companion for the Synamail Outlook add-in: rolling AI profiles of your mailing partners, stored in your own Synaplan workspace.
author: Synaplan

routes.description: List all contact profiles (summary preview, counts, timestamps)
Fetch the rolling profile of one contact (null when none exists yet)
Roll one email into the contact's profile (AI merge of summary, tone, facts, open loops)
Delete a contact's profile entirely (privacy / GDPR)

settings.description: Language for profile summaries (auto = follow the correspondence)
Upper bound for the rolling summary length in words
